faqs.question: What is HireSync?
faqs.answer: HireSync is an AI-powered recruitment platform designed to streamline hiring processes for businesses, recruiters, and candidates. It offers resume parsing, job posting, interview scheduling, AI-driven candidate matching, and analytics to optimize recruitment workflows

faqs.question: Who can use HireSync?
faqs.answer: HireSync is designed for:- Recruiters & HR Teams  To manage job postings, track candidates, and streamline hiring.- Businesses & Hiring Managers  To oversee recruitment, approve job postings, and manage talent pipelines.- Job Seekers  To apply for jobs, track applications, and engage with recruiters

faqs.question: How does HireSync improve recruitment efficiency?
faqs.answer: HireSync automates tedious hiring tasks using AI, such as resume parsing, candidate-job matching, and recruiter task suggestions. It also offers interview scheduling, in-app messaging, and data-driven hiring insights.

general.question: How does the system post job openings on social platforms?
general.answer: The system integrates with platforms like LinkedIn and Naukri to automatically post job openings when a recruiter creates a new job listing.

general.question: Can the system filter and rank candidates automatically?
general.answer: Yes, it uses AI-driven screening to analyze resumes, match skills with job descriptions, and rank candidates based on relevance.

general.question: What is the Automated Recruitment Management System?
general.answer: The Automated Recruitment Management System is a platform that streamlines the hiring process by automating job postings, candidate screening, interview scheduling, and applicant tracking.

general.question: Does it support interview scheduling?
general.answer: Yes, the system provides automated interview scheduling with calendar integration, reducing manual effort for recruiters.

pricing.question: Is HireSync free to use?
pricing.answer: HireSync offers different pricing plans based on business size and needs. We provide a free trial for new users to explore the platform.

pricing.question: What support options are available?
pricing.answer: We offer customer support via email, live chat, and a knowledge base with guides and tutorials. Premium plans include dedicated account managers.

pricing.question: Can I customize HireSync for my companys needs?
pricing.answer: Yes! HireSync allows businesses to tailor features, workflows, and dashboards to match their hiring processes

pricing.question: How do I get started with HireSync?
pricing.answer: Simply sign up on our platform, set up your profile, and start managing your recruitment process efficiently

others.question: Is my data secure on HireSync?
others.answer: Absolutely! We implement robust security measures, including data encryption, role-based access controls, and email proxying to protect user information.

others.question: Does HireSync comply with hiring regulations?
others.answer: Yes, we support compliance tracking for diversity hiring and legal requirements, ensuring ethical and unbiased recruitment practices.

others.question: Can I prevent direct contact between candidates and recruiters?
others.answer: Yes, HireSync offers email proxying and redacts personal contact details to maintain privacy and prevent unauthorized communication.

functionality.question: Does HireSync support resume parsing?
functionality.answer: Yes, HireSync extracts key details (name, experience, skills) from resumes in PDF, DOC, and other formats to help recruiters quickly assess candidates.

functionality.question: Can I post jobs directly on HireSync?
functionality.answer: Yes, recruiters and employers can create, edit, and manage job postings. The platform also allows for approval workflows before jobs go live.

functionality.question: How does AI candidate matching work?
functionality.answer: Our AI-powered matching algorithm analyzes job descriptions and compares them with candidate resumes, ranking applicants based on skills, experience, and job requirements.

functionality.question: Does HireSync offer interview scheduling?
functionality.answer: Yes! HireSync integrates with Google Calendar and Outlook, allowing recruiters to schedule interviews and send automated reminders.

functionality.question: Can I communicate with candidates through HireSync?
functionality.answer: Yes, recruiters and candidates can use in-app messaging and email integrations to communicate within the platform.
